merchantBrief: Northstar Outdoor has 42 units of the Cedar / M Alpine Storm Shell available after a restock from zero one day ago. Fifty-five shoppers expressed intent without an observed purchase, and no restock campaign appears in the last 30 days. At the scenario-assumed 8% conversion rate and current $188 price, the deterministic scenario value is $827.20; this is an assumption, not a forecast or causal estimate.
recommendedAction: After human approval, run a controlled restock email test only among shoppers confirmed eligible by consent and deliverability checks. Randomly retain a holdout group for attribution, verify inventory immediately before activation, and measure incremental purchases against the holdout without claiming causal impact beforehand.

campaignDraft.subject: The Alpine Storm Shell is back in Cedar / M
campaignDraft.body: The Alpine Storm Shell in Cedar / M is back in stock at Northstar Outdoor for $188. Availability may change, so check the current product page if you are still interested.

missingInformation: Shopper consent and channel eligibility status
Eligible audience size after consent, deliverability, and suppression checks
risks: Inventory may fall below demand before or during activation.
The assumed 8% conversion rate may not reflect observed performance.
Without a randomized holdout, incremental impact cannot be attributed to the campaign.
Sending without verified consent or deliverability status could create compliance or reputation risk.
